message:
feat(ftui-text): add microtypographic justification controls (bd-2vr05.15.2.5)

Implement TeX-style horizontal spacing modulation for the Knuth-Plass
pipeline: JustifyMode (Left/Right/Center/Full/Distributed), GlueSpec
(natural+stretch+shrink in 1/256 sub-cell units), SpaceCategory
(inter-word/inter-sentence/inter-character), SpacePenalty, and
JustificationControl with three presets (Terminal/Readable/Typographic).
Includes adjustment ratio computation, cubic badness, and line demerits.
64 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
